title: Aggressive vs Baseline
summary: Aggressive outperformed Baseline in the side-balanced evaluation. It won 62% of matches with an average goal difference of +1.13. aggressive_s1 outperforms baseline_s1 after controlling for side assignment.
copilot_prompt: Compare Aggressive and Baseline using the side-balanced evaluation. Explain who performed better and what the result suggests about policy behavior.

title: Baseline vs Safe
summary: Baseline outperformed Safe in the side-balanced evaluation. It won 61% of matches with an average goal difference of +1.08. baseline_s1 outperforms safe_s1 after controlling for side assignment.
copilot_prompt: Compare Baseline and Safe using the side-balanced evaluation. Explain who performed better and what the result suggests about policy behavior.

title: Aggressive vs Safe
summary: Aggressive outperformed Safe in the side-balanced evaluation. It won 72% of matches with an average goal difference of +2.41. aggressive_s1 strongly outperforms safe_s1 after controlling for side assignment.
copilot_prompt: Compare Aggressive and Safe using the side-balanced evaluation. Explain who performed better and what the result suggests about policy behavior.

title: Baseline vs Baseline
summary: Baseline vs Baseline is the reference matchup. It is useful for understanding the benchmark policy without comparing against a different tactical style.
copilot_prompt: Explain the baseline versus baseline reference matchup and what it shows about the benchmark policy.
